title: Black Concrete Util
description: Helps you actually see black concrete!
body:
<font size=+2>**Minecraft's black concrete got you confused? Finding it extremely hard to build with and almost invisible? 😖**</font>

<font size=+1>**Me too! 🙃**</font>

That's why I created this pack, I made it as a way for me actually to be **able to tell where I am placing blocks,** then thought to myself hey why not help some other people out?

Minecraft's black concrete is **no longer annoying** to be trapped in or **to build with**, now you can **clearly see it!**

<font size=+1>Enjoy! 😄</font>
